sla_days_per_regulator.description: SLA calendar in days per regulator. Keys: GDPR, PDPL, RMA. Value is calendar days from request date to fulfillment deadline.

fulfillment_letter_template_path.description: Path to a Jinja2 Markdown template for the fulfillment letter. Leave empty to use the built-in default. Wave D: PDF rendering path.

cryptoshred_policy.description: Governs how Art-17 cryptoshred requests are executed. 'immediate': DEK is destroyed as soon as an admin triggers the action. 'deferred-7d': destruction is queued 7 days out, allowing reversal. 'require-second-approval': a second Doc Admin must approve before the DEK is destroyed.

identity_verification_required.description: When true, the admin must confirm subject identity (upload of government-issued ID) before any fulfillment action can be triggered.

webauthn_step_up_for_fulfillment.description: When true, the admin must complete a WebAuthn step-up challenge immediately before triggering any fulfillment action (Art-17 cryptoshred, Art-15 export). Adds a second authentication factor at the point of action.
